title: preptanthe elmeri
intro: Preptanthe elmeri, also known as Elmer's preptanthe or Elmer's blue mountain mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Preptanthe elmeri include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Preptanthe elmeri are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
